text:
GG0170J3_WLK_50_2_TURN_END_CD GG0170J3_WLK_50_2_TURN_END_CD GG0170J3 Discharge Performance Walk 50 Feet Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to walk at least 50 feet and make two turns at the time of discharge. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to walk at least 50 feet and make two turns at the time of discharge. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
05 =
